data.body: Plan-review PASSED (llm_ran=true, signed @ e45f9e34) after 3 iterations. Remediated: the critical conflict_resolver byte-divergence (its json.dumps omits ensure_ascii -> default True, so migration REQUIRES content_hash(ascii_only=True, default=str)); named each migrated caller in the byte-equality test; specified golden constants captured from PRE-refactor paths (non-tautological). Remaining P6 ac-quality advisory judged INVALID/false-positive: its and-counter flags Oxford-comma enumeration lists (non-ASCII, nested, and unicode-key payloads; the 5-caller list), which are single lists not bundled deliverables, so each line stays independently verifiable. Claimed immediately per the stale-attestation guidance.
